rows: Avalon Hotel and Bungalows Palm Springs

Website was not working properly, we had one free night stay through the Marriott Bonvoy Brilliant card (platinum status), but it wouldn’t let us book more than one night with the free night award.Anyways we called this hotel to ask if it was possible to keep the same room if we book two nights under two reservations. Not only did this hotel refuse to help us, but they also mentioned that they would charge us twice for pet fees since we had two reservations. Their website clearly says one time fee per stay.No point staying in a 400/night hotel if they try to nickel and dime you at every corner. You’ll probably find better service at a random motel than this place.

The best part of this hotel was the valet, albeit pricy. The front desk and hostess at peacock were alright. But pretty much everything else was lacking. Room wasn't cleaned on one night and when asking for towels because of this they were unfriendly.  The service at peacock was also bad. The coffee service in the morning had no pastries, no coffee, and no hot water...If this hotel was a book it would have a great cover and not much else. Not worth it.

I will update this when the day comes where I can get through to ANYONE when calling. I either get a merciless automated phone system that's impossible to get past, or I am put on hold. The sad thing is that I am calling about an event there as well as likely lodging for the same. I guess they don't need the business!
The lady bartender tonight charged me $5 for a Diet Coke can… the little drink gun has Diet Coke on it… so unnecessary

Pillows are too soft and standard rooms face an alleyway and dumpster.  Additional fees are a joke.  The pool is far too small and the cabanas have barely any amenities other than being super sweltering.

Though the room was ok, the dinner downstairs was SO noisy that we couldn’t hear our family across the table! Even though we went to another floor to have a nightcap, it was even more noisy!We checked out after the first night and moved to another hotel!

Perfectly nice hotel but not nearly as nice as four seasons and it costs more. AC doesn't work very well, no daily turn down service, impossible to get a person on the phone. It's a luxury hotel for people who have never stayed at an aman, rosewood, or the Austin four seasons.

If you are considering hosting your wedding event at the Austin Proper Hotel, we would strongly recommend not moving forward with this venue. We are deeply disappointment with the service provided for our wedding event hosted in September 2025. We had a horrendous experience working with our assigned event manager. We expected a seamless and memorable experience, but instead our experience with the event manager’s consistent lack of communication, lack of professionalism, and lack of punctuality is inexcusable for a hotel that prides itself on delivering luxury service.A significant issue was the lack of billing transparency. I was charged tens of thousands of dollars to my credit card without prior notice or an itemized statement. After I requested an itemized statement, multiple errors w

The Room rates do not tell the complete story. There are excessive charges for too many things.There are multiple tax fees (to be expected) but there is an Amenity Fee of $130. I was told it was for things like the spa, workout area, morning coffee area, etc. One would think that at ~$700.00/nt. Plus taxes and fees workout area might be included.Dinner was excellent and reasonable. Breakfast was poor and over the top expensive. A two egg omelette with a slice of toast and watered down coffee, with tip was $42.00 for one person

I may be jinxed but the marriott online reservation process always requires a phone call - yes, wasting 21 minutes on the phone. I manage the IT for a firm so the marriott reservation struggle is a mystery to me. I tried to reserve a room using the AAA rate. The reservation would not go through, hence the dreaded call. Despite my Bonvoy status, I am going to give Marriott a pass in the future.BTW - Austin hotel tax is one of the highest in the country at 17%.Expect to get dinged with fees.

There is a nightclub downstairs and the hotel’s designers apparently partied too hard and slept through the class on noise insulation, so you’re going to hear loud pounding music until 1am on weekends - fun if you’re at the club, sucks for everyone else.If you complain about it they’ll act super surprised to hear this news (despite the bass being audible everywhere in the first several floors) and offer to move you to a lower tier room farther from the club.Nice bathrooms though.

OverallNice hotel but beware of feesPositive+ Nicely designed hotel and rooms.+ Staff very friendly and helpful+ Well maintained and cleaned+ Breakfast tasted goodNegative- The restaurant added a 4% "Wellness fee" to all bills. Asking at the reception I was told this was to help the community. Researching only it seems it is meant to pay for employees' health benefits. Really poor style to add such costs as extras, instead of having them included in the base price of the dishes. This is also on top of the daily "Resort fee" being added to room cost.- My in-room speaker didn't work (cable didn't provide power). I mentioned it twice during my three day stay but it was never fixed.- While my room was cleaned well daily, stuff I had rearranged (lamps, hotel ads, etc.) were always moved back. I

Needs to get the basics right.1. My room was within a few feet of a parking garage. No sunlight and the view of a parked car staring at me every morning.2. Small room with poor layout. No drawers for clothes and minimal seating area. Awkward experience ordering in room dining with little place for the food to be set up.3. No laundry or dry cleaning on the weekend. The clothes are sent out and the service is not available on the weekend. Not suitable for a premium hotel.
Felt like a four star hotel, definitely not 5 star. The rooms were very small and basic, the staff had no idea what was going on and then lobby / restaurants were dirty, and disorganised.

Good: The The room was small but niceAnd I was told it was an upgrade so I can’t imagine what the regular room I had originally booked would beStaff was nice and the food was goodBad: The lobby was so noisy you could hardly hear yourself as was the restaurant was very very loud like you were at a nightclub and it was noon so you really couldn’t do any work in the lobby area which was part of the attraction to book this the only place I could do anything was in my room so I was disappointed. I would’ve been better off at just a Marriott.

I want to begin by saying how much I admire the property. It truly is one of the most beautiful and elevated spaces in Austin, which is why I’ve chosen to frequent it often and recommend it to guests from out of town. However, I feel compelled to share my disappointment with the inconsistency I’ve experienced during visits, most recently last night.I had called ahead to confirm seating availability at La Piscina for my mother, who was visiting from New York and loves dining there. I was told there were three seats available first come first serve (not a problem) hopped in the car and headed that way ( keep in mind I don’t live that far). When we arrived, however, she was told at valet that the hotel was at capacity and we would not be allowed in. This was confusing and frustrating—especial

If you bring your personal vehicle to The Proper, be prepared to have their valet staff use it to high beam and otherwise harass the homeless on the other side of The Butterfly Bridge. This has gone on for years. Valet management was contacted concerning the matter well over a year ago and their valet continue to high beam, flip off and talk smack out the open windows of guests cars. As recently as last night.

The hotel is stylish and the valet/pool staff were great, but as a Marriott Platinum Elite member I was very disappointed. None of the usual benefits (late checkout, breakfast, welcome gift) were honored since this is a Design Hotels property. On top of that, they charge a daily “destination fee” that covers virtually nothing. Beautiful space, but it left me feeling nickel-and-dimed — elites should know their perks don’t apply here.
Thank you Jeff and the wonderful woman working the front desk!
Abigail and I both had massages and they were excellent. I wish there was a dry sauna available without extra charge.
I am looking for reasons to be im Austin more often so that I can receive a massage by Victoria.  She was excellent!
Someone in the spa was extraordinarily helpful to my wife who stressed due a wedding event where the room was too dark to do her makeup.
shower and locker room amazing. Would prefer to have hotter water when taking a shower after the rejuvenate/restore room
Would be nice to have a separate relaxation room.  Also options for drying or packing  wet swimsuits. Easier access to Recovery Room tools: red light therapy start/stop button and a clock or timer.
I thought since areas of the public areas of  hotel looked worn. Particularly the wood floors.
Olivia at the front desk was incredible. Kind, attentive, knowledgeable, considerate, friendly. Wonderful customer service and experience.
Front desk person was overwhelmed and couldn’t keep up with demand
Beds may have been a little soft for our liking. The window sill had quite a bit of water pooled on the window sill - guessing it was condensation.
Steam room in women’s locker room wasn’t very hot, took a while to fill with steam

Had to chase about guided run option.  No one got back to me.  Then wasn't available once  I finally did chase (granted it was Christmas week).      Massage therapist was good, professional and nice.  But not amazing.
Maya the massage therapist was the best I have ever had.

This was sadly the most disturbing spa / massage experience. I have sensitivities to vomit and having a therapist work on me who came in sick (vomiting twice inside the therapy room sink and insisted she was okay to continue work) unfortunately left me nauseous for hours.
guest advised construction noise is keeping her from sleeping
guest would like to move rooms
guest reported that the room next to them has women screaming after 12:00 midnight
apologized and advised Security would be dispatched immediately * advised guest to contact the front desk if noise continues after 15-20 minutes
Front Office - Room Type Request Not Available
Guest was very upset that her preferred room 1006 was not assigned to her for this stay.
Showed guest room 1106 but she is still pretty disappointed. Recovered and promised guest that we will delight throughout the stay.
Had a wait for the room
Guest messaged us "my wife and I came to escape and get some rest and unfortunately have very loud little kids in the conjoining room next to us.". Guest was originally in room 707
Assisted guest with a room move to DLS 919 and guest is satisfied.

Guest was upset that his laundry was not able to be completed. Guest called down late at night stating that he received a call/voicemail that his laundry was unable to be picked up and completed. Guest was confused and frustrated as he requested on Thursday evening for the items to be picked up
MOD attempted to assist guest but guest hung up angry and frustrated
Guest's room was not ready upon arrival due to upgraded room from FHB inclusion
Guest wanted the upgrade and were okay with waiting. MOD walked guest to Peacock to take care of $60 of their bill. HSPK notified
Guest was woken up by ENG team trying to take care of a ticket regarding shower. Wrong room was provided by accident - causing ENG to disrupt this guest by accident
DOH to follow up with guest later afternoon
Food & Beverage - Service issue (delay or other)
Guest was disappointed in the IRD experience. He had to call several times to request items that were forgotten in the order and felt it dimmed the service.
Guest was very nice. Informed guest we would comp the breakfast and IRD manager would reach out to apologize and thank for the feedback.
Guests room didn't have the ideal view
Room moved to a room with nicer view
Apologies extended offered a different room
Guest called down upset that someone knocked on her door this morning to collect an empty tray even though she never requested it and had a DND sign on.
Apology extended and honored 2pm late check out. Guest is satisfied.

During check-in guest stated that he was supposed to get a $100 AMEX benefit credit. Guest's reservation did not include it. Guest was upset and confused but could not find where it was located on his confirmation email
as a gesture MOD provided guest with a $50 credit. Guest was thankful
Front Office - Not satisfied with room

Shortly after checked in, Mr. Messer called down asking if he was in the right room category. Confirmed that he was in a PK like what he booked. He was confused because the floor plan provided online for PK does not look like the room he was in. He also said that his room felt smaller than whats sta
Floor plan for PK is showing what looks more likely to be a GK on our website. Guest was upgraded to a GK due to confusion, and will stop by the desk after lunch to retrieve room keys.
Speaker Not Connecting: stated that it will only connect for a couple seconds and disconnects from phone.
Offered to send new speaker/ fix current one

Called guest to verify all was well with order since HSP reported some miscommunication. Guest mentioned he drinks a lot of water and just had mentioned if he could get more. He said while he had me on the phone wanted to also report handle of closet was loose. Said Bellman noticed and let him know
DOH sent more water up as well as place ticket for ENG. I let him know Ill follow up with him later. Repeat guest, mentioned he loves it here and always recommends.
There was some confusion at Check-in because guest did not think he had to provide a CC because he does not usually at other Marriott properties.
FD and MOD provided guest with mobile check-in link which he used to provide the card. Guest was in better spirits after check in.

Guest was upset that she did not get Turndown Service. MOD explained to guest that turndown is by request and we did not have a request for her this evening. Guest got frustrated that she had to request turndown everyday.
Guest's profile has been updated to ensure turndown is associated with her reservations

Guest called down requesting to speak with a hotel manager. Guest wanted to express a few frustrations. Guest was upset about the size and view of the room. Guest was also upset about the Wellness and Service fee of his IRD order. Guest was also upset that when he order La Piscina to-go, he had to g
Guest did not want to speak with FDM. Info passed over to Hotel Manager
The blackout curtains will not go down
Guest room was not ready and bags took a long time
Apologies extended and room was upgraded to shorten wait

The guest returned with their vehicle at approximately 11:15 a.m. About 30 minutes later, the guest and their family went for a walk and found the vehicle stationary on the drive. The guest confirmed with MOD that they had requested the vehicle be parked and also noted that it appeared to have been

Mr.Condit James was checking in and the reservation was under Robinson megan. He was an add on her res. As i was going through the check in process, i mentioned to Mr. Condit if Megan will be joining since she is the primary person on the res  and also  i was going thru her ambassador status. Mr Con
just flagging this res. incase guest is a Celeb FOP
Guest was unable to turn off the lights from the closet and suggested to reconsider the design of this feature since the light shines through.
Assistance from Eng was declined since his kids were asleep. Offered to assist tomorrow by fully disconnecting this light or provide an alternative.

Mr. and Mrs. Childress are visiting from West Texas to have their vehicle serviced. Unfortunately, we were unable to retrieve the vehicle due to a dead key fob. MOD worked closely with them to explore all possible options for starting the vehicle. MOD and Mrs. Childress agreed that the best course o
Guest called FD to inquire about clothes that were left on the floor and after servicing the room they were wondering if they were placed somewhere else.
Connected with HSKP - MOD to follow up.
Different guest bags were in the room upon check-in
Apologies extended and new room immediately provided
Front Office - Not satisfied with room
Guest checked in to 408 and was confused since the room did not look like the 15 series he stayed in last time.
Moved guest to 915 and guest was very appreciative. Profile notes updated.

Guest called about receiving a cancellation text for her LP reservation. She informed us that her reservation was supposed to be booked for Mar 21 but it was made for Mar 14 instead. Currently no active reservation under her name for Mar 21. Guest is very upset since she has been trying to get this
LP team has been informed to see availability and connect with guest.
Guest was checked in to 324 and came down saying the room smelled like garbage.
Moved guest to new room 1123 and apologized.
Food & Beverage - Service issue (delay or other)
Guest did not receive their door knob order
Apologies extended, guest did not want the breakfast made.
Guest let us know after checking in that the mini bar was not replenished and wanted to avoid any charges.
Extended apologies, reconfirmed no charges were going to be applied for the missing items and offer to replenish the mini bar at their time of preference.
Blinds not working - guest notified when i did a pulse check
N/A - I asked for an amenity send
Engineering will check prior to gust return
Guest said the water pressure in the shower is low and there were other issues with the shower head
Guest wants ENG to come after 12pm
Front Office - Not satisfied with room
Guest called down right after check in, inquiring for a higher floor room in the same category. Guest was initially in room 311.
Informed guest that available higher floor PKs would be slightly smaller. Guest still prefers high floor and bigger window, so assisted with room move immediately.
Yesterday guest mentioned that it was very noisy in her room due to LP.
Megan set up a room just in case for the rest of the stay. Turned down LP and will check with guests to see how the night was.
Guest has to be relocated due to leak above.
SMS sent to guest to move and waiting to hear back.
Guest called down to state that his room was too hot and he is having trouble with the themostat
Guest stopped by the desk to share he had requested to service the room, but it was not serviced yet.
Ticket had been placed around 6 pm and was completed by HSKP. We clarified with guest and sent extra towels and cleared the trash.
Toilet Paper hanger - Loose every day
We need to prioritize the project of getting these fixed permanently
Front Office - Not satisfied with room
Guest is dissatisfied on the room we gave him to move to. Guest does not like ADA. Gave guest other options.
Guest extended and due to 11th floor buyout, we could not aaccomodate staying in the same room.
At check-in guest request a fan and a cotton blanket. MOD had trouble locating items and searched in the laundry room and went floor-to-floor to locate a cotton blanket for guest

Was able to locate fan but not a cotton blanket. MOD ensured guest that a cotton blanket will be delivered to room tomorrow. Guest also requested to have only fitted sheets on the bed no duvet tomorrow
Food & Beverage - Service issue (delay or other)
Guest was upset because of how long it took to get a hold of IRD.
Connected guest to IRD. May be phone user error.

Due to MOD stepping away from desk completing deliveries, guest was calling front desk and had a long delay. During the phone call guest stated that each time he stays here, he spends a long time trying to get ahold of the front desk in the evening.
MOD apologized and rushed his request up
Guest's sink overflowed onto the bathroom floor
Placed ticket for HSKP to mop up
Room was said to check out yesterday & cleaned as a checkout yesterday. Room was checked out this AM and flipped to clean. Room is still occupied by guest. Glitching for visibility
Checked back in. Guest was not disturbed
Guest req a 7am wake up call, Night MOD called the room at 7am but he did not get an answer. Guest texted at 8.20 reporting no one called her.Guest is very upset.
offered if we can anything for her since this is impacting her day already.
Guest was disturbed after someone knocked on her door & entered her room while she was sleeping
Extended apologies, guest was placed back in-house since their room was checked out
Shortly after 11pm guest called down inquiring about her request for towels she submitted around 10:30pm. Guest also stated that she did not receive HSPK service.
OVN MOD rushed clean towels to room and removed dirty towels.
Guest called down at 1:30am stating that she did not receive her dog bowls she requested at 9:30pm
OVN apologized and ensure guest that the two dog bowls will be delivered in the morning. Guest would like for the dog bowels to be placed outside of her door.
Guest were seated in the lounge when a very intoxicated non hotel guest began to bother them. Security was notified immediately and guest was escorted off property.
Manager made contact with table, apologized for the brief disruption and offered to buy a round of drinks. The guest were very grateful for the quick handling of the situation.
Front Office - Not satisfied with room
Guest called down hed did not like that his room was facing the wall, he requested to move to a  different room that is not wall facing.
guest is moving to 1119, we gave him a comp upgrade
Food & Beverage - Safety or health concern
Guest called saying the MB bottle of Pinot Noir was opened.
MOD apologized and swap the item asap.
Front Office - Not satisfied with room
Guest was initially in room 423 however she stated the room was very depressing so we offered room move to room 1105 and guest is now satisfied with new room.
Guest moved to upgraded PK to 1105
IRD food took ~45 min to be delivered
GRA mixed up the room number and placed a ticket to strip + pick up tray to the wrong room. FOP was in the room sleeping and got disturbed
Apologies extended- guest has a 5PM LCO
Guest mentioned that last two days drip coffee was cold.
Fedor apologized in person and comped today's drinks. Guest was happy and appreciative.

Guest texted us "Also do you have a different type of body wash besides the Geranium Leaf? I use Aesop at my own home but not this flavor, but I think I am having an allergic reaction to this Geranium leaf"
checked with hskp, tghey do not have an other scents other than the ones in the room.
Guest called asking for the bed sheet to be changed completely since they found a tiny bug on the bed.
Service scheduled at 11:30am per guest request. Glitching for awareness.
Front Office - Not satisfied with room
Guest was disappointed in their view in the room. Asked for another room with more light.
All we had for 3 nights was a PQ but guest did not want a double queen room. Apologies extended and offered an extra lamp.
Guest called to state that their toilet isnt flushing
Guest reported that the bluetooth speaker is not working.
Apology extended and ENG ticket placed.

Guest stopped by FD this morning a bit discombobulated. After asking guest if we could assist with anything he left the FD & was later seen attempting to enter the residential elevator, back of house, & later wandering around the 2nd floor
Security was called, the guest was eventually escorted to his correct room (room 812)
Guest found half drank coke zero in fridge that was not his.
Minibar replenishing fridge/snacks. Julia got him 2 drinks at the bar to make up for it
Food & Beverage - Service issue (delay or other)
The door knob order was never delivered. Guest called back asking where's the order.
order was sent asap and comped
guest advised there is no bluetooth speaker in the room via Canary
apologized to guest and submitted ticket to Engineering
Food & Beverage - Service issue (delay or other)
Oatmeal was delayed for her door knob order.
Guest had items missing from laundry delivery (socks, etc.) He was also given items that were not his.
Apologies extended. Informed guest that we would locate the items as soon as we could.
guest came to pk host stand at 6:55 asking for two barstools from the pk bar to go to their room
engineering brought them a different two chairs
Kanishka Lohar parked vehicle as a daily park and the key fob was lost while her keys were in the possession of valet
advised guest management will be in contact with her * guest seeking compensation for key fob replacement and rideshare traveling round-trip to pick up new key fob to drive vehicle away
guest was surprised that they did not receive turndown service and needed water
advised guest i would place td service on room for remainder of stay and took water up personally as there was a delay getting items to room * guest okay
Front Office - Amenity or item delivery issue
guest mentioned that her friend receives a reset and recharge amenity
advised guest that reservations have different packages and amenities associated with them and that her reservation would be notated
Guest called stating that she did not receive turndown service
Sent towels up and ensured her that we will complete turndown service tomorrow

Ava ticket was placed with just an Other request. DOH called to inquire specifics. She mentioned she was calling for a spoon as her order of soup did not bring any. She said she no longer needed it and that they ate the soup without it.
Guest was understanding said we were probably slammed. Glitching for awareness.
Front Office - Room Type Request Not Available
Guest was upset about room type and was told he would get an upgraded king room.
Offered room move on the last 2 days of stay to upgraded king.
Assistant called on behalf of the guest from the room to notate that fresh towels and amenities were provided, but the room was not cleaned which is what they had requested.
MOD extended apologies and ticket has been placed to fully service the room tomorrow at 9:30 am per guest's preference.
Musty smell and mold in room.
Offered guest to move rooms from 808 to 906 due to guest having sensitivity to mold/musty smell in 808
Guest called down looking to upgrade to a balcony room but we are currently sold out on PKB until Sunday. Glitching for awareness in case something opens up.

Guest called front desk to inform Valet there is a scrape under his driver side door. MOD reached out to guest to inform him that we are investigating the incident. Unfortunately, Mr. Haywood did not answer and their voicemail is not set up. MOD will try reaching out again once camera footage is ret

A guest arrived at the spa stating he had a 10:00 AM Recovery Room session. Upon reviewing the schedule, the guest was not listed for an appointment.  The guest mentioned he was “texting you all right now,” but the messages were actually being sent to Concierge, not the spa directly. It appears that
Front Office - Not satisfied with room
Guest is frustrated that we do not have comp suite upgrades available due to him not receiving king room.
Offered to move to king room on saturday
Front Office - Not satisfied with room
guest would like a higher room with a view
advised guest we can see if we have anything for him in the morning -- will pass on to AM MOD * guest okay
Guest experiencing issues with in-room phone
Guest was told the spa was open until 7. He showed up at 6:30 for a Recovery room session and the spa was closed.
Offered the guest a free recovery room session
Guest reported the TV not working, did not provide more details. Guest was in a rush.
Ticket has been placed for Eng.
Guest called the FD and reported that there was someone opening his door.
Security to approach and look into this issue.

Ms. Kasmere stopped by the FD to get an additional key to her husband's room. She provided the conf. number related to Mr. Obediente's booking with check in date arriving tomorrow. Offered to check in the reservation today, however she stated this was incorrect and he was already in house. Guest lef
Sales later confirmed it is Mr. Lakeith's wife. Name has been added to the reservation and Sales to reach out.
Guest reported sink draining very slowly
Created ticket for eng to fix while hskp servicing room
Coffee was cold when it arrived in the room, and the ordered side of chicken was incorrect. Only a single chicken kebab was sent, but the request was for plain chicken.
Sent up hot coffee and plain chicken. Guest happy
Missing Loewe Candle - was on IRD Tray when picked up - please check if in IRD office
Guest asked for the room to be cleaned, but when they got back they said it was dirty
FD asked when a good time for TD was and placed a ticket.
Guest had 2 body wash and no conditioner. Ticket was placed by FD to replace during service. Not glitched, glitching for visibility
Conditioner bottle sent up in the AM - Room will be serviced and double checked for all bottles

Around 11pm guest came down to the front desk extremely upset that the phone was not being answer. Guest was also upset of his room location. Guest requested to be near the elevator but was checked into room 509.

MOD apologized to guest and informed him that we do not have a phone attendant and the team was assisting with multiple guests as he was calling. MOD moved guest to new room 1104 and assisted with the room move.
Front Office - Amenity or item delivery issue
Guest had an amenity that was not moved after he was upsold.
Amenity sent to correct room the next day
Front Office - Not satisfied with room
Guest checked in in RM1005 and later texted via canary that he thought his room had been upgraded when booking with Reservations to a PK with a seating area.
Offered apologies for discrepancy and showed a larger room in the same category (long stay guest), assisted with room move and guest was very satisfied.
the panel by the bed does not work
ENG ticket placed for for the morning

Apologies extended to the guest, ENG working on the smell. FD MOD to follow up during the evening

offered full service at TD at 7pm

ENG ticket placed. After awhile, guest called back and ask if we could ask ENG to leave the room and complete the work-order tomorrow morning as he wanted some rest/sleep
Guest stopped by the front desk to inquiry about the noise at 4am from outside of the hotel
MOD apologize and offered a room move, but guest declined. Guest stated she'll use a noise machine if it does persist another night
Guest called down letting us know that there was a stain on his duvet.
Apology extended and would like bed sheet changed at 6pm. Ticket placed

Guest was disappointed in the IRD experience. He had to call several times to request items that were forgotten in the order and felt it dimmed the service.

Guest called about receiving a cancellation text for her LP reservation. She informed us that her reservation was supposed to be booked for Mar 21 but it was made for Mar 14 instead. Currently no active reservation under her name for Mar 21. Guest is very upset since she has been trying to get this
Guest let us know after checking in that the mini bar was not replenished and wanted to avoid any charges.

Ava ticket was placed with just an Other request. DOH called to inquire specifics. She mentioned she was calling for a spoon as her order of soup did not bring any. She said she no longer needed it and that they ate the soup without it.
Coffee was cold when it arrived in the room, and the ordered side of chicken was incorrect. Only a single chicken kebab was sent, but the request was for plain chicken.
Missing Loewe Candle - was on IRD Tray when picked up - please check if in IRD office

Overall, I liked this hotel and had a positive stay, but there are some notable drawbacks worth mentioning. During busy times, the hotel feels overcrowded, elevator waits can be long, parking is difficult with the valet when it's busy, and the check-in area can get backed up as well.The lobby bar is very pretty but gets  busy on Friday and Saturday nights.Unfortunately, my Bonvoy Gold Elite status was not honored nor did I receive any benefits from it which was disappointing.That said, the rooms

Our stay was great.  The staff is friendly, the place is clean, and the food in all restaurants was tasty.  We especially enjoyed Ryan at the front desk, Dan as bellman, Makenna as hostess to La Pascina and Pedro as waiter.

I would return again to this hotel.  It's very fun and beautiful.  We enjoyed the restaurant and the small bar off the lobby.  The rooms are fantastic, clean and have all the necessities.  We had a couple hiccups that were more than adequately resolved.  I look forward to our next stay.  Room 304, a King room with sitting area, is great!
Early dinner at the Peacock which was great as always, love any one of the hummus. Ryan and Michael in valet were speedy and fantastic. Always a good time.
Beautiful design hotel. Great public spaces, restaurants and bars. Spa was ok. Good treatment but the cold plunge and sauna area very disappointing.
We always love the proper! The customer service is excellent, food is awesome, and the rooms are cozy. We come here for a getaway yearly.
I had an outstanding experience. The food was delicious and the setting was romantic and scenic.

This is truly one of the best hotels I have stayed in. The location, the design, the vibes, the in room amenities, the cleanliness - every single detail is thought of and executed flawlessly. The rooms are built so wonderfully that you truly can’t hear anything outside of your own room - very peaceful. Even more impressive was the amazing service we experienced during our stay. Every interaction with the staff was led with such kindness and thoughtfulness - it truly was so wonderful. My husband

We just stayed at the Austin Proper Hotel and I honestly can’t say enough great things about this place. From the moment we arrived, the experience felt elevated, thoughtful, and genuinely warm.A huge shout-out to Anis, the Director and GM of Experience, along with Elina, Kristin and the guest services team. Their hospitality was exceptional. They went above and beyond in every way, including a complimentary upgrade to a stunning King Premier Guest Suite and a beautiful arrival welcome with cham
Good: Great hotel, fun bar, lovely room, friendly staff.  Moved me to a great room when asked.

Positives: Nice facility,  great food, service was great. Our restaurant server-Will and baggage claim helper-Hardwick were especially helpful.  They had a nice coffee/crepe place just across the bridge and on the other side of the street. I highly recommend it as well.Negatives: Ask for a room on a higher floor! Our room was on the 3rd Floor, and the music was Booming so loud from their club that it made it hard to go asleep. Granted it was a Friday night, but still unacceptable.  Also, the hot

I usually stay at the Proper when I’m in Austin.  Apart from the captivating ambiance and delicious food, the service is always top notch.  I rarely leave reviews but was asked to do so this time.  I have nothing but good things to say anyway!  Kendra, Stephen & Miguel were on it, from the moment I arrived to the moment I left this trip!  There was a mixup in my NYE celebration reservation, and Giulio was polite & quick to accommodate.
Great location, nice rooms, good restaurants/amenities. Restaurants/Bar can be over run with locals.

Great experience overall and easily one of the best hotels in Austin. Every food and beverage outlet was excellent, and the style and décor throughout the property are beautiful. A special shout-out to Dodd in the Quill Room for the lovely service and spot-on dinner recommendations. Everyone on property was genuinely friendly and welcoming. The only small miss was that the scheduled turndown service on night three did not happen, but it did not take away from an otherwise outstanding stay. I can
The best dinner at peacock and an incredible night at the quill - Giulio is the best host ever in this proper hotelRooms were amazing and the entire atmosphere was great
wonderful hotel with great restaurants and bars on the lower levels
This was one of the nicest stays in a long time. Absolutely beautiful hotel. Love the design details and whole vibe. Had a fantastic breakfast and incredible service. Wish our stay was longer!

My teen daughter and I had weekend trip to the hotel and had a wonderful stay. The hotel is a great city hotel - beautifully designed with really comfortable, decently sized rooms and in a good location.Warm reception, strong service through and through - front desk, bars, restaurants (we ate at both), valet. There is quite a scene in lobby bars which I had no problem with - it was a cool scene and I didn't hang out there but so folks know. Mexican and Med restaurants served great food.The weath
My wife and I loved staying at this hotel. Impecable service.  The restaurants are great.  We loved La Piscina. Highly recommend!

Love going here on a weekday to work when I have minimal meetings. The coffee is great, many areas to sit and the staff are easy going. Multiple options for coffee, food and alcoholic drinks (if you end up staying for happy hour). There’s parking on the street, valet and multiple garage options for a fee.
Kendra was the person who helped us with valet and she was so kind! She even gave us a recommendation for dessert at the restaurant we were going to in the hotel. Thank you,Kendra!

The level of service here is outstanding. I felt so at home and they were all so lovely and welcoming. They were also welcoming to my dog and we had a very memorable time together. The design here is not just interesting but it also makes you feel like you could just move in and stay forever. Thank you to the entire staff for the wonderful stay. It’s an oasis in the city, with beautiful trails and restaurants right outside.

Huge shoutout to Tyler at the front desk! I haven’t slept through the night in (maybe 6 months? More????) because….kids. She set me up with a great room  to relax in for a night and get some rest. This Mom is very grateful!!!!  Also, in general, this hotel is great. I always direct visitors in Austin to their restaurant.

I stayed at the Austin Proper for roughly a week while visiting family.  Hotel is kept in pristine condition, well-located and unique.  Plenty of great dining options on-property.  I also just experienced (Dec 2025)  their new Omakase restaurant - Kappo Kappo; a must-try for sure.Chloe at the front desk was very helpful with all my needs, including the initial reservation.  The entire front desk staff is always eager to help. Evie in the coffee lounge in the AM very kind, helpful, and always mak
The lady bartender tonight charged me $5 for a Diet Coke can… the little drink gun has Diet Coke on it… so unnecessary

I stay here Everytime I visit Austin, easily the best spot in town. Giulio, Chris, and Marshall are the best and take care of us every time, love the lobby bar and goldy’s. Can’t say enough about them and the energy there.

This is a true 5-star hotel. We spent a week here so I can truly say that the entire staff is super helpful and friendly. All the restaurants are great. Housekeeping is amazing. Gym is large and well appointed. The Goldie’s hostess in the morning is a gem. I would go back again and again.

Pillows are too soft and standard rooms face an alleyway and dumpster.  Additional fees are a joke.  The pool is far too small and the cabanas have barely any amenities other than being super sweltering.

As a resident, I just want to give a huge shoutout to Evie! Over the past couple of years, she has transformed Goldie’s morning coffee bar into something truly special. The hotel's complimentary coffee and beautiful space are wonderful, but it’s Evie’s kindness and her ability to anticipate everyone’s needs that make the morning ritual unforgettable. We all love her!
